#!../../bin/linux-x86_64/tcastDemo

#- You may have to change tcastDemo to something else
#- everywhere it appears in this file

#< envPaths

## Register all support components
dbLoadDatabase("../../dbd/tcastDemo.dbd",0,0)
tcastDemo_registerRecordDeviceDriver(pdbbase)

epicsEnvSet("TCAST_DEFAULT", "group=239.128.5.4")

## Load record instances
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastHealth.db","P=TST:")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=TST:E0F:,TCAST=15")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=TST:E8F:,TCAST=0x8f")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=TST:E02:,TCAST=event=2")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=TST:E00:,TCAST=0")

var tcastDebug 1

iocInit()

## Start any sequence programs
#seq snctcastDemo,"user=mdavidsaver"
